title: Systems Administrator
description: Toast is hiring a Systems Administrator for our Provo office to manage and maintain our IT infrastructure. You'll support both internal operations and work with customer deployments. This role offers broad exposure to systems administration and the opportunity to work for a fast-growing restaurant technology company.
responsibilities: Manage Windows and Linux servers; perform patches, updates, and maintenance
Administer network infrastructure, firewalls, and VPN connections
Support user accounts, permissions, and IT security policies
Troubleshoot hardware and software issues; provide technical support
Document systems, procedures, and maintain IT asset inventory

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field; or equivalent experience
skills: Strong communication and customer service skills

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
